events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is an **AAV (Air Admittance Valve) installed where prohibited** — a rough-in defect under IPC 917/UPC 908. Marked `fail`, `high` risk, with findings around missing open-air vent termination, possible prohibited-space installation (plenum/exterior/sump), and required corrective actions (remove/relocate or replace with conventional vent-through-roof, re-inspect before closing in).
